case_title: JIN HUI HUANG VS. STANLEY PING NA KEUNG

docket_entries.description: D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, JIN HUI
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED JAN-11-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, JIN HUI
CORRESPONDENCE RE:DMV CERTIFICATE OF FACTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HUANG, JIN HUI AS TO DEFENDANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (11 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, JIN HUI

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, JIN HUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, JIN HUI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, JIN HUI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KEUNG, STANLEY PING NA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HUANG, JIN HUI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
